description: Eleanor confronts Marcus in the Blackwood Mansion library. Demonstrates master shot + simple directive workflow.

face.description: Young woman, short black bob haircut, intense eyes, red turtleneck visible

outfit.description: Red leather tactical coat, fitted, futuristic design with angular panels

visor.description: Futuristic red and silver wraparound visor, reflective lens

motorcycle.description: Sleek red and chrome motorcycle, futuristic design, cyberpunk aesthetic

pistol.description: Futuristic silver pistol with red accents, compact design

boots.description: Red and silver tactical boots, armored, futuristic design

face.description: Middle-aged man, sharp features, calculating expression

outfit.description: Dark tailored suit, expensive, traditional businessman aesthetic

wide_establishing.description: Ornate library: floor-to-ceiling bookshelves, leather furniture, fireplace, dark wood paneling

detail_texture.description: Leather chair detail, book spines, wood grain, brass fixtures

depth_perspective.description: View down the length of the library showing depth, windows in background

atmospheric.description: Moody lighting: fireplace glow, shadows, film noir atmosphere, blue-tinted moonlight through windows

CYBERPUNK_NOIR.description: Gothic Victorian noir aesthetic: high contrast shadows, moody atmospheric lighting, film noir composition, Blackwood mansion gates aesthetic

shots.semantic_prompt: Wide establishing shot of an ornate library in Blackwood Mansion. Eleanor, a young woman with short black hair wearing a striking red leather tactical coat and futuristic visor, stands confidently near the fireplace. Marcus, a middle-aged man in a dark tailored suit, sits in a leather chair across the room. The library features floor-to-ceiling bookshelves, dark wood paneling, and moody lighting from the fireplace and blue-tinted moonlight through tall windows. Cyberpunk noir aesthetic with high contrast shadows and cinematic composition. Shot on 28mm wide lens with deep focus.
shots.camera_notes: 28mm wide, deep focus, rule of thirds composition
shots.lighting_notes: Fireplace key light, moonlight fill, high contrast

shots.semantic_prompt: Close-up of Eleanor matching the master shot reference. Her intense eyes are visible through the futuristic visor which reflects the firelight. Same moody library atmosphere and lighting. She looks skeptical and calculating.
shots.camera_notes: 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field
shots.action: Eleanor reacts to Marcus's proposal with skepticism

shots.semantic_prompt: Close-up of Marcus matching the master shot reference. His sharp features are lit by the fireplace glow. Same library atmosphere. He maintains a calculating expression.
shots.camera_notes: 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field
shots.action: Marcus makes his pitch, confident and manipulative

shots.semantic_prompt: Over-the-shoulder shot from Eleanor's perspective looking at Marcus, matching the master shot reference. Eleanor's red coat and visor are visible in foreground, Marcus in focus in background sitting in the leather chair. Same library setting and moody lighting.

Over-the-shoulder shot from Marcus's perspective looking at Eleanor, matching the master shot reference. Marcus's dark suit visible in foreground, Eleanor in her red coat and visor in focus. Same library atmosphere and lighting.

Medium two-shot matching the master shot reference. Both Eleanor and Marcus are visible, tension between them. Eleanor stands near the fireplace, Marcus remains seated. Same library setting, moody lighting, cyberpunk noir aesthetic.
shots.action: Tension escalates as they reach an impasse

shots.simple_directive: Wide shot from across the room
shots.semantic_prompt: Wide shot from across the room matching the master shot reference. Eleanor turns and walks toward the library door, her red coat flowing. Marcus remains seated, watching her leave. Same ornate library setting, fireplace and moonlight creating dramatic shadows. Cyberpunk noir atmosphere.
shots.action: Eleanor walks out, ending the negotiation

scene_notes.reference_strategy: All coverage shots use master as Slot 12 reference for automatic continuity
